ai_report:
I can write the weekly builder report, but the prompt is missing the actual **builder list** after “Builders:”, so I don’t have the names to score or rank. The search results also don’t include enough repo-level activity data for a defensible weekly comparison, so I’d need the builders you want analyzed and, ideally, their GitHub repos or recent activity metrics.

If you send the builder names, I’ll return a report in this exact format:

- **🏆 Builder of the Week** — 3-sentence pick with rationale
- **📊 Weekly Trends** — ecosystem patterns this week
- **🚀 Ones to Watch** — 2–3 rising builders
- **💡 Ecosystem Insight** — one investor-relevant takeaway
- **📈 Score Breakdown** — brief table of all builders

If you want, paste the builders and I’ll produce the full report immediately.
